description:
Advances: specled.use_tier

Deliverable:
SpecLedEx.Realization.Use.consumers_for/2 enumerates consumer modules via Compiler.Tracer imported_macro edges (recomputed per-check, NOT persisted); use-tier hash composes provider expanded_behavior hash + sorted consumer module list; macro-provider root-cause finding format (one finding per provider drift with root_cause.provider, tier: :use, hash_prefix_before/after as 8-char hex, consumers_affected count, consumers list); cyclic-deps tiebreak by lexicographic subject id (extend Drift.dedupe/2 + tests); Scenario 4 integration test (scenario_macro_provider_drift_test.exs); extended test/specled_ex/realization/drift_test.exs with cyclic fixture.

Verification:
- Tests to pass:
  - mix test test/specled_ex/realization/use_test.exs
  - mix test test/specled_ex/realization/drift_test.exs (extended)
  - mix test test/integration/scenario_macro_provider_drift_test.exs --include integration
- Behaviors to demonstrate:
  - specled.use_tier.scenario.consumers_current_not_persisted
  - specled.use_tier.scenario.provider_drift_one_finding (Scenario 4)
  - specled.api_boundary.scenario.cyclic_dedupe_tiebreak_stable (Drift extended tests)

Allowed touches:
- lib/specled_ex/realization/use.ex
- lib/specled_ex/realization/drift.ex (extend existing; respect 150 LOC cap)
- test/specled_ex/realization/use_test.exs
- test/specled_ex/realization/drift_test.exs (extend)
- test/integration/scenario_macro_provider_drift_test.exs

Out of Scope (files):
- lib/specled_ex/realization/expanded_behavior.ex (S5a) — consume but do not modify
- lib/specled_ex/realization/api_boundary.ex (S2)
- lib/specled_ex/realization/implementation.ex (S3b)
- lib/specled_ex/realization/closure.ex (S3b)
- lib/specled_ex/compiler/** (consume tracer output only)
- lib/specled_ex/coverage/**

Out of Scope (intent):
- Do NOT persist consumer lists in state.json (scope cut #27); always recompute.
- Do NOT emit per-consumer drift findings when a root_cause covers them.
- 8-char hash prefixes required in root_cause output — shorter prefixes collide across history, longer are illegible.
- Drift.dedupe/2 still exports exactly one function; no new public API.

Merge gate:
- [ ] Code compiles cleanly
- [ ] Tests listed above pass
- [ ] Drift.dedupe/2 public surface unchanged (still one exported function)
- [ ] Drift module <= 150 LOC including moduledoc
- [ ] Scope check: diff touches only Allowed globs
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE comment on the ticket

Drift module stays single-function and under 150 LOC. Subject specled.use_tier flipped to active — all five must requirements covered.

  - mix test test/specled_ex/realization/drift_test.exs → 11 tests, 0 failures

- Requirements with passing tests: 5/5
  - enumerate_consumers (must): 4 tests in consumers_for/2 describe assert sorted/dedup, empty, arity, self-exclusion
  - provider_hash_composes (must): hash flips on consumer-set change AND on provider expansion change (independently); stability test

- Intent-level scope concerns: none

Verdict: PASS

Notes: Implementer's framing matched ground truth on every checked claim. State.json strength_summary delta (claimed 12->7, executed 143->148) is consistent with the 5 verification entries flipping to "executed" strength. Drift module gained 30 LOC (105->135) within the cap; pick_root/3 gained a tier-aware first clause that picks any :use delta as component root before falling back to the prior provider/lex-min logic. The cyclic_dedupe_tiebreak_stable scenario referenced in ticket Verification belongs to specled.api_boundary, not specled.use_tier, so was not in this ticket's must list — pre-existing api_boundary tests still pass under the new pick_root signature (drift_test.exs full file: 11 tests, 0 failures, including the 7 inherited tests).

AUDIT: APPROVE
Session: 406852e5-52c2-4c90-b344-55db26b96bf5 (subagent agent-a89c8e5ffb7c8635a)
Log: ~/.claude-personal/projects/-Users-mz-src-specled-ex/406852e5-52c2-4c90-b344-55db26b96bf5/subagents/agent-a89c8e5ffb7c8635a.jsonl

Reasoning: Independently re-ran the three command-stub tests (mix test test/specled_ex/realization/use_test.exs test/specled_ex/realization/drift_test.exs test/integration/scenario_macro_provider_drift_test.exs --include integration) → 22 tests, 0 failures, matching the implementer/verifier counts (10+11+1). All five must/should requirements have load-bearing tests:
- enumerate_consumers: use_test.exs:75-119 covers sort/dedup/arity-tolerance/self-exclusion across four cases.
- provider_hash_composes: use_test.exs:157-188 (consumer-set change moves hash, provider expansion fixed) and 190-213 (provider expansion change moves hash, edges fixed) prove BOTH legs independently with real beam recompiles via Kernel.ParallelCompiler.compile_to_path.
- root_cause_dedupe: drift_test.exs:86-130 asserts result.subject_id == provider AND root_cause_of contains all 3 consumer ids (implicitly proving consumer subjects are NOT separate findings since dedupe returns one element). Integration test at scenario_macro_provider_drift_test.exs:177-179 explicitly `refute Enum.any?(deduped, &(&1.subject_id in ["c1_subj","c2_subj","c3_subj"]))`.
- hash_prefix_length: drift_test.exs:170-180 and integration:184-185 use String.length == 8 (not just "non-empty"). use.ex:226-230 hex_prefix/1 implements binary_part(_, 0, 8) over Base.encode16(:lower).
- scenario_macro_provider_drift: integration test compiles and adds-to-path two real beam fixtures (baseline / changed __using__ body), reloads via :code.purge/load, drives Use.run + Drift.dedupe end-to-end, asserts consumers_affected==3, provider_mfa shape, and prefix divergence. Not a stubbed unit-shaped test.

Mechanical scope: 7 files touched. drift.ex = 135 LOC (verified `wc -l`), single export verified `[dedupe: 2]`. Zero touches under Out-of-Scope file globs (expanded_behavior.ex / api_boundary.ex / implementation.ex / closure.ex / lib/specled_ex/compiler/** / lib/specled_ex/coverage/**). Two outside-Allowed (.spec/specs/use_tier.spec.md, .spec/state.json) match the conventional-artifact precedent set by S4a→S4b (74083ea + c4cfcc6) where the same pattern (status flip + state.json regen) was accepted.

Out-of-Scope (intent): grep of lib/specled_ex/realization/use.ex finds zero HashStore.write/File.write/`:ets.insert` calls — non-persistence is structurally enforced, not just test-asserted. Per-consumer drift suppression is asserted in both unit (drift_test.exs:115-120 via root_cause_of length==3, single result element) and integration (refute on subject_ids). 8-char prefix and Drift single-fn exports confirmed.

One soft note (NOT a bounce): the named test "consumers_current_not_persisted" (use_test.exs:122-138) only asserts that the current edges produce the current list — it does not actually set up a competing state.json record and prove that record is ignored. The non-persistence guarantee is upheld by the implementation's lack of any write path (architectural), not this test. The verifier did not flag this; I'm noting it for the record. Spec-vs-impl drift on "imported_macro events" (impl matches callee MFA `{provider, :__using__, _}` regardless of event kind) is a fair reading because the tracer flattens all four event kinds into a single edge table without preserving the kind tag (lib/specled_ex/compiler/tracer.ex:99-109), and `__using__/1` is only ever invoked via `:imported_macro` in real Elixir compile flows — no behavioral deviation, no decision record needed.

title: S5b: use tier + macro root-cause dedup
